title: MENTAL HEALTH URGENT WALK-IN CLINIC - 211info
text: CASCADIA PLAZA HEALTH CENTER MENTAL HEALTH URGENT WALK-IN CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides care to those experiencing a behavioral health crisis. Services are based on clinical need and may include counseling, prescribing medications, and referrals to affordable mental health, medical, and substance treatment and other community resources. 4212 SE Division Street Suites 100 and 200 Portland, OR 97206 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-9pm, Saturday-Sunday 9am-9pm Email (503) 963-2575 - Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 963-2575 Urgent Walk-in Services Helpline (503) 988-4888 Multnomah County Crisis Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Multnomah County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus line 2 Services: In Person Crisis Intervention Mental Health Crisis Lines Mental Health Drop In Centers Other Services Offered At This Location: GENERAL MEDICAL CARE - HEALTH CENTER SERVICES SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - CASCADIA CENTRAL INTAKE AND REFERRAL LINE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CASCADIA PLAZA HEALTH CENTER
